hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.env'; then echo "BLOCKED: Direct .env edit detected. Update credential values manually."; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then cd /Users/ianvincent/workspace/hudo-2026 && pnpm type-check 2>&1 | tail -20; fi

cd /Users/ianvincent/workspace/hudo-2026; CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null; git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); CODE=$(echo "$CHANGED" | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx|sql|js)$' | grep -v node_modules); NOTES=$(echo "$CHANGED" | grep -E '^SESSIONNOTES\.md$'); if [ -n "$CODE" ] && [ -z "$NOTES" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage":"Reminder: code changed this session but SESSIONNOTES.md was not updated. Add a dated entry before stopping."}'; fi
